text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: If you wish to be first-rate, you mustlaugh more elegantly!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Gasp! S-so this is what a first-rate laughsounds like...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Please, give me another chance! I shall<n>keep
laughing until my laugh embodies<n>the elegance of
a princess!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Such a diligent expression looks<n>good on
you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Continue on, and aim for the highest<n>heights! May
your laughter reach the<n>stars above!
